description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a metallic finish, featuring bold, high-contrast graphics on its exterior. The front displays the word 'TORNADO' in large, yellow, distressed lettering, with 'ENERGY' and 'ACTIVE' below, all set against a black background with dynamic, fiery accents. The can has a standard pull-tab opening at the top, typical of beverage containers. The sides and back of the can are densely covered with fine print, including nutritional information, ingredients, and other regulatory details. The overall design is visually striking, intended to attract attention and convey a sense of energy and intensity. The can's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing its premium, modern appearance.
description: A tall, glossy black can with bold yellow 'TORNADO' branding and energetic, fiery graphics, featuring detailed labeling and a metallic pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'TORNADO ENERGY' branding in large yellow letters with fiery graphics and the word 'ACTIVE' at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the transition from the main branding to a dense block of fine print, likely ingredients and nutritional information.
description_view_2: Back view is dominated by detailed text, including nutritional facts and regulatory information, with minimal graphic elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the edge of the main branding and more fine print, wrapping around the can.
attribute_brand_logo: The front of the can features a visible brand logo: 'TORNADO' in large, distressed yellow letters with 'ENERGY' and 'ACTIVE' below, all set against a black background with fiery accents.
attribute_flavor_indication: The word 'ACTIVE' appears below the main branding, but no explicit flavor is indicated.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back and side of the can in fine print.
